name: Teishoku Restaurant
tagline: Japanese set meals in a Kalihi shopping center — miso butterfish, miso soup, rice, pickles, all for one price. Tourists will never find this.
mustOrder: miso butterfish teishoku — the signature set meal
chicken katsu set — crispy and satisfying
any daily special — the rotating items are where the kitchen shines
parking: Kamehameha Shopping Center lot on N School St
talkStory: Teishoku means "set meal" in Japanese, and this Kalihi spot on N School Street has been serving complete trays — miso soup, salad, pickled vegetables, rice, and protein — at prices that feel like 2005. Deep in neighborhood territory where no tourist has ever wandered. Featured in Honolulu Magazine as a hidden gem. The miso butterfish teishoku is the signature. Fast service, family-run, closed Mondays.
